query:
SELECT at2.instanceId, ai.requestId, at2.stageId, at2.status, COUNT(*) as task_count
FROM approvalTasks at2
JOIN approvalInstances ai ON at2.instanceId = ai.id
WHERE at2.status = 'pending'
GROUP BY at2.instanceId, ai.requestId, at2.stageId, at2.status
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
LIMIT 10
command:
